label: Terrestrial
description: A physical habitat primarily located on solid ground.

label: Aquatic
description: A physical habitat located in or around bodies of water such as oceans rivers or lakes.

label: Aerial
description: A physical habitat located in the sky clouds or upper atmosphere.

label: Labyrinth
description: The mythological maze built by Daedalus in Crete to contain the Minotaur commissioned by King Minos.
